title: Automate creating a PNG from a PDF image in a board
excerpt: I would like to automate creating a PNG image form a PDF image in a Monday board. Does anyone know of a third party app that I can use which cam ingrate with Monday.Com. We already use Pabbly but can’t find a app that do…

posts.author: alistairJT (Alistair)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to automate creating a PNG image form a PDF image in a Monday board. Does anyone know of a third party app that I can use which cam ingrate with Monday.Com. We already use Pabbly but can’t find a app that does this?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alistair!

You can leverage Make.com (formerly Integromat) for a seamless workflow. It allows integration with third-party apps like CloudConvert, which supports PDF to PNG conversion. You can set up a workflow where Monday.com triggers the conversion of the PDF and automatically stores the PNG image back to your board.

If you’re already using Pabbly, you might not find this specific function, but with Make.com, the integration is simple and highly customizable. I can help set this up for you with minimal effort. Let me know if you’d like to explore this further!

Let’s Schedule the call
